enforcement.check: Model files must not contain methods or function declarations
enforcement.message: Models must not contain behavior. Move methods to services.

enforcement.check: Models must be in correct layer directory
enforcement.message: Model appears to be in wrong layer directory based on content.

enforcement.check: Use type keyword for model definitions
enforcement.message: Prefer 'type' over 'interface' for data shapes. Use 'interface' only for behavioral contracts.
